mapper.select: SELECT I.ITEM_CD, I.ITEM_NM, I.UNIT_CD, I.SAFETY_STOCK, I.REORDER_POINT, I.ORDER_QTY, I.MOQ, I.REP_VD_CD, I.REP_VD_NM, NVL((SELECT SUM(S.QTY) FROM ST_STOCK S WHERE S.COMP_CD=I.COMP_CD AND S.ITEM_CD=I.ITEM_CD),0) AS CUR_QTY, NVL((SELECT SUM(PI.QTY - PI.GR_QTY) FROM PO_ORDER_ITEM PI JOIN PO_ORDER PO ON PO.ID = PI.ORDER_ID WHERE PI.ITEM_CD = I.ITEM_CD AND PO.DEL_YN='N' AND PO.STS='PC' AND PI.QTY > PI.GR_QTY),0) AS ON_ORDER_QTY FROM IT_ITEM I WHERE I.DEL_YN='N' AND I.ITEM_STS='ACTIVE' AND NVL(I.REORDER_POINT,0) > 0 ORDER BY I.ITEM_CD
mapper.update: UPDATE MR_SUGGEST SET DEL_YN='Y' WHERE COMP_CD=#{compCd} AND STS='SUGGEST' AND DEL_YN='N'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO MR_SUGGEST (COMP_CD, RUN_YMD, ITEM_CD, ITEM_NM, UNIT_CD, CUR_QTY, ON_ORDER_QTY, AVAIL_QTY, SAFETY_STOCK, REORDER_POINT, SHORTAGE_QTY, SUGGEST_QTY, REP_VD_CD, REP_VD_NM, STS, REG_ID, MOD_ID) VALUES (#{compCd}, TO_DATE(#{runYmd},'YYYY-MM-DD'), #{itemCd}, #{itemNm}, #{unitCd}, NVL(#{curQty},0), NVL(#{onOrderQty},0), NVL(#{availQty},0), NVL(#{safetyStock},0), NVL(#{reorderPoint},0), NVL(#{shortageQty},0), NVL(#{suggestQty},0), #{repVdCd}, #{repVdNm}, 'SUGGEST', #{regId}, #{regId})
mapper.select: SELECT M.ID, TO_CHAR(M.RUN_YMD,'YYYY-MM-DD') AS RUN_YMD, M.ITEM_CD, M.ITEM_NM, M.UNIT_CD, M.CUR_QTY, M.ON_ORDER_QTY, M.AVAIL_QTY, M.SAFETY_STOCK, M.REORDER_POINT, M.SHORTAGE_QTY, M.SUGGEST_QTY, M.REP_VD_CD, M.REP_VD_NM, M.STS, C.CD_NM_KO AS STS_NM, M.SRC_PR_NO FROM MR_SUGGEST M LEFT JOIN CM_CODE C ON C.GRP_CD='MR_STS' AND C.CD=M.STS AND C.DEL_YN='N' WHERE M.DEL_YN='N' AND M.STS=#{sts} ORDER BY M.STS, M.ITEM_CD
SELECT ID, COMP_CD, ITEM_CD, ITEM_NM, UNIT_CD, SUGGEST_QTY, REP_VD_CD, REP_VD_NM, STS FROM MR_SUGGEST WHERE ID=#{id} AND DEL_YN='N'
mapper.update: UPDATE MR_SUGGEST SET STS='ORDERED', SRC_PR_NO=#{prNo}, MOD_ID=#{modId}, MOD_DT=SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE ID=#{id}
UPDATE MR_SUGGEST SET STS=#{sts}, MOD_ID=#{modId}, MOD_DT=SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE ID=#{id}
